description_long: This is a modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring clean lines and a combination of white, beige, and gray exterior finishes. Large floor-to-ceiling windows dominate both levels, allowing for ample natural light and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor spaces. The structure includes a spacious terrace with a small pool and outdoor seating area, as well as a garage with a visible car parked inside. The building sits on a dark, rectangular base that elevates it slightly above ground level, with steps leading up to the main entrance. The rear of the bungalow features additional outdoor space, while the front is characterized by a prominent entryway and driveway. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, with an emphasis on open, functional living areas.
description: A modern, two-story flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a terrace with a pool, and a garage, finished in white, beige, and gray tones. The design is sleek and minimalist, emphasizing open spaces and outdoor connectivity.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bungalow, large windows, terrace with pool, and garage entrance.
description_view_1: Narrow end view highlighting the terrace, pool, and outdoor seating area, with the layered structure visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the garage with an open door, driveway, and extensive window arrangements.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back facade, steps leading to the entrance, and the elevated base structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on both levels
